name: TC-OT-005 — GET /api/v1/token: issued_at < now < expires_at (valid time window)
description:
**What this test does:**
Validates the token time window is logically consistent:
- issued_at is in the past (token was issued before now)
- expires_at is in the future (token has not yet expired)
- issued_at < expires_at (the window is non-zero and correctly ordered)

**Why it matters:** An inverted or zero-width time window indicates a clock-skew problem or a misconfigured token lifetime, which would immediately invalidate the token.
descriptionHtml:
What this test does:
Validates the token time window is logically consistent:

  • issued_at is in the past (token was issued before now)
  • expires_at is in the future (token has not yet expired)
  • issued_at < expires_at (the window is non-zero and correctly ordered)

Why it matters: An inverted or zero-width time window indicates a clock-skew problem or a misconfigured token lifetime, which would immediately invalidate the token.
